summary: Iteration_16 regression smoke test PASSED 100%. Verified that moving /app/frontend-next to /root/frontend-next-bak caused no regression in the live preview environment. All 8 smoke checks from the request green.

smoke_results.1_homepage_wizard: PASS - WizardPage rendered, 'Get me a quote' CTA present, link box present, mega menu shows Engagement Rings / Collections / Custom Design / Past Projects / Journal / Contact. No React error overlay, no 'Link is not defined' or 'Cannot read properties of undefined' errors.
smoke_results.2_pdp_5_carat_oval: PASS - /projects/5-carat-oval-solitaire-engagement-ring renders with [data-testid=v2-title], v2-fast-badge, v2-add-to-bag, hero image, metal selectors (Silver/10K/14K/18K/Platinum), carat selectors (1ct..4ct), price $1,800+. 6 JSON-LD blocks injected (Organization, WebSite, Product, BreadcrumbList, etc.) via react-helmet-async.
smoke_results.3_collection_engagement_rings: PASS - /collections/engagement-rings rendered with 2 [data-testid^=product-card] cards. No Helmet 'expects a string as a child of <title>' error in console.
smoke_results.5_admin_login: PASS - /admin/login → submit ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 → lands on /admin Analytics dashboard.
smoke_results.6_otp_login: PASS - /login → filled email → Send code → [data-testid=otp-display-code] returned 6-digit OTP → otp-login-otp-input → /dashboard rendered with [data-testid=account-overview] (Overview tab, 'Hi, smoketest', Custom quotes/Orders/Messages tiles).
smoke_results.7_backend_seo_endpoints: PASS - GET /robots.txt 200 (3155 bytes), /llms.txt 200 (1978 bytes), /api/sitemap.xml 200 includes project URLs (4-41-carat-radiant-hidden-halo, 3-40-carat-oval-side-stone, 5-carat-oval-solitaire), /api/settings/public 200, /api/projects 200 returns 3 projects.
smoke_results.8_supervisor_status: PASS - supervisorctl status shows ONLY: backend RUNNING, frontend RUNNING, mongodb RUNNING, nginx-code-proxy RUNNING, code-server STOPPED (infra only). NO legacy_frontend program present.

test_credentials: Admin ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 verified working. Customer OTP works with any email; code revealed via [data-testid=otp-display-code].
seed_data_creation: None. Created an ephemeral customer account 'smoketest@example.com' via OTP login flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was iteration_16 — a pure infra/build-context smoke check after moving the unused /app/frontend-next directory out of /app. The live preview env is fully green and matches iteration_15 behavior. User can now safely re-trigger the Emergent production deploy.
rca of the issue: N/A - regression smoke test only, no bugs found.
